mapper.select: SELECT id, title, description, status, planned_release_date, actual_release_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM releases WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, title, description, status, planned_release_date, actual_release_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM releases ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, title, description, status, planned_release_date, actual_release_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at FROM releases WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO releases (title, description, status, planned_release_date, actual_release_date, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{plannedReleaseDate}, #{actualReleaseDate}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE releases SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, planned_release_date = #{plannedReleaseDate}, actual_release_date = #{actualReleaseDate}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM releases WHERE DATE(created_at) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM releases WHERE status = '已发布' AND DATE(actual_release_date) BETWEEN DATE(#{startDate}) AND DATE(#{endDate})
